description.en: Convert text into realistic speech audio using ElevenLabs AI voices.
description.de: Text in realistische Sprachausgabe mit ElevenLabs KI-Stimmen umwandeln.

vars.API_KEY: env:ELEVENLABS_API_KEY|Get your API key from ElevenLabs at https://elevenlabs.io/app/settings/api-keys

inputs.name: Voice ID

description.en: The ID of the voice to use. Use the list-voices warp to find available voices.

inputs.bot: The ElevenLabs voice ID. Common defaults: 'EXAVITQu4vr4xnSDxMaL' (Bella), '21m00Tcm4TlvDq8ikWAM' (Rachel). Use the list-voices warp to find all available voices.

inputs.name: Text

description.en: The text to convert to speech.

inputs.bot: The text content to convert into speech audio.

inputs.name: Model
inputs.bot: The model to use. Options: 'eleven_multilingual_v2' (default, best quality), 'eleven_turbo_v2_5' (faster, lower latency), 'eleven_flash_v2_5' (fastest).

inputs.name: Stability

description.en: Voice stability (0.0-1.0). Lower = more expressive, higher = more consistent.

inputs.bot: Voice stability from 0.0 to 1.0. Lower values make speech more expressive/variable, higher values make it more consistent. Default around 0.5.

description.en: Similarity boost (0.0-1.0). Higher = closer to original voice.
